exercises.name: Bodyweight Squat
exercises.cue: Full depth. Pause briefly at the bottom.

exercises.name: Hip 90/90 Switches
exercises.cue: Sit on floor, both knees at 90°, rotate side to side. Keep torso tall.

exercises.name: Ankle Rocks (half-kneeling)
exercises.cue: Front foot flat, drive knee over toes. Feel the stretch in the calf and ankle.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.cue: Slow, full range. Inhale on cow (arch), exhale on cat (round).

exercises.name: Goblet Squat Hold (15 lb DB)
exercises.cue: Sit into the bottom of a squat and hold. Use the DB as a counterbalance. Push knees out with elbows.

tuesday.title: Bench Day Warm-Up
tuesday.targetAreas: Shoulder capsule, rotator cuff, thoracic spine

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.cue: Light band, arms straight, squeeze shoulder blades at end range.

exercises.name: Arm Circles (small → large)
exercises.cue: Start with small circles, progressively widen. Both forward and backward.

exercises.name: Wall Slides
exercises.cue: Back and arms against wall. Slide arms overhead, keeping contact with the wall. If you can't maintain contact, reduce range.

exercises.name: Push-Up to Downward Dog
exercises.cue: Perform a push-up, then press hips up and back into downward dog. Feel the lat and shoulder stretch at the top.

exercises.name: Dead Hang (pull-up bar)
exercises.cue: Relaxed grip, let the shoulders open. Breathe.

thursday.title: Deadlift Day Warm-Up
thursday.targetAreas: Hamstrings, hip hinge pattern, thoracic spine

exercises.name: Hip Hinge with Broomstick/PVC
exercises.cue: Hold stick along spine (touching head, upper back, tailbone). Hinge at hips keeping all three contact points. This grooves the pattern.

exercises.name: World's Greatest Stretch
exercises.cue: Lunge forward, plant both hands inside the front foot, rotate and reach to the ceiling with the inside hand. Covers hip flexors, t-spine rotation, hamstrings, and adductors in one movement.

exercises.name: Leg Swings (front-to-back)
exercises.cue: Hold the rack for balance. Swing through full range with a straight leg. Controlled, not ballistic.

exercises.name: Cat-Cow
exercises.cue: Same as Monday. Mobilizes the entire spine before axial loading.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Romanian Deadlift
exercises.cue: Slow, feeling the hamstring stretch at the bottom. Squeeze glutes at the top. Pattern rehearsal before loading.

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.cue: Same as Tuesday. Activates posterior shoulder before pressing.

exercises.name: Band Dislocate
exercises.cue: Wide grip on a light band. Arc it from hips to behind your back and return. Use a grip wide enough that there's zero pain. If your bands are too heavy, skip this and double the wall slides.

exercises.name: Wall Slides
exercises.cue: Same as Tuesday. Overhead pressing demands the most shoulder mobility of any barbell lift.

exercises.name: Thoracic Extension over Towel
exercises.cue: Roll up a towel, place it on the floor. Lie on it at mid-back level, hands behind head, extend over the towel. This directly targets the t-spine extension needed to press overhead without compensating through the lower back.

exercises.name: Dead Hang (pull-up bar)
exercises.cue: Opens lats and shoulder flexion range. Tight lats are the

thursday.focus: Hamstrings, glutes, hip flexors, lower back

sunday.notes: Search for "Slow Flow" or "Beginner Yoga Flow" on Peloton. Prioritize hip openers and shoulder stretches.
